text:
Created attachment 207385
patch to update the port

- Update 1.46 --> 1.48
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Workflow

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with poudriere 3.3.2_1 at 12.0-RELEASE-p10 amd64 with perl 5.28.2
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail of poudriere say: "PASS".
